title: Remove onboarding modal so users land directly on main app

requirements.text: Remove the 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' onboarding modal (ProfileSetup component in frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx) entirely. Users must no longer be prompted to enter their name upon authentication — they should land directly on the main app without any interstitial modal or name-entry step.

quotes: 1. Just this step. 2. The users directly go to the main app and register themselves to get access to other information

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' modal (name entry + Continue button) is no longer rendered anywhere in the app.
After authenticating via Internet Identity, the user lands directly on the main app (LandingPage or Dashboard) with no modal interruption.
All code references that trigger or conditionally show the ProfileSetup modal (e.g., in AppLayout or any parent component) are removed or disabled.
The registration flows (Director, Production House, and Advertising Professional) remain accessible from the main app for users to self-register.

constraints: Do not remove or modify any registration forms or flows — only the onboarding modal is to be removed.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
Do not touch any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Replacing the onboarding modal with a different authentication or entry method.
Changes to the registration forms or their submission logic.
